progress_summary: Retrospective token+cost audit of all Claude Code work on opchain (2026-07-19 run, second fire of the day). Scanned 1,752 transcripts, matched 541 by in-file cwd (48 top-level + 493 nested subagent runs); the head -1 filter trap reproduced exactly (493 vs 541). Deduped 11,210 assistant lines to 4,719 unique message.ids (2.38x streaming inflation avoided, per-field max), excluded 143 zero-token synthetic rows. Merged append-safe on entry_id against the earlier 2026-07-19 ledger (4,750 rows / $1,074.87): 4,536 overlap re-priced, 214 preserved historical rows back to 2026-05-26, 40 new. 651.5M tokens for $1,078.74 across 49 sessions. Fable 5 58.7% / Opus 4.8 40.1%; sonnet-4-6 and opus-4-7 are preserved-history only (opus-4-7 still unpriced live, carried at its original epoch). Cache reads are 92.7% of tokens but a small slice of cost. PR #376 remains the single biggest driver at 24.6%; unattributed 17.3%. 16 PRs diverge >20% between the two attribution modes.
